title: Noir's Sabres
body:
![Noir's Sabres](https://images-ext-2.discordapp.net/external/FzfhwIxKZwPGrvKtcPK574iXZ-aa5_0wGZ3NkMaDSWs/https/static1.textcraft.net/data1/9/6/96126db371f48b6e77f50a534ef3febfe08a3590da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd80709da39a3ee5e6b4b0d3255bfef95601890afd8070992e3f4ed5d0a184f1188f1be5dce6feb.png)

A small resource pack that converts swords to thinner and fancier sabres, applied to all six of the base swords.

![The sabre in question](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/755069180851781773/1136100139287715990/image.png)
